channel.title: QRL Ecosystem Index
channel.description: Recent content on QRL Ecosystem Index

item.title: QRL Hub
item.description:
QRL Hub is a community-maintained resource website for learning about QRL, quantum computing threats, blockchain security, and the quantum-resistant future of cryptocurrency. The site includes educational pages, FAQs, quantum news, QRL 2.0 information, and links to the official QRL website.

QRL Hub states that it is not associated with the QRL Foundation and provides educational content only.

item.title: QuantaSwap
item.description:
QuantaSwap is a decentralized exchange (DEX) built on QRL 2.0 smart contracts. It provides an automated market maker (AMM) system allowing users to swap tokens, provide liquidity, and earn yields.

The protocol uses a constant product formula for price discovery, ensuring liquidity in all market conditions. Users can earn QSWAP tokens by providing liquidity to pool pairs.
